evals.prompt: Fetch the current user identity from the gateway.
evals.expected_output: An object with `success: true`, `authenticated: true`, `user.{id,email,name,authType}`, `access.{instanceId,subdomain,tenantId,authenticatedAt}`, `organization.{customerId,companyName,plan,planDisplayName}`, `authorization.{groups,roles,permissions[]}`, and `session.{authProvider,isServiceUser,...}`.
assertions: get_user_info is called with no parameters
Response includes success: true and authenticated: true
authorization.permissions is an array (may be empty)
get_tenant_info is called with no parameters
Fields that are not configured come back as the literal string 'Not configured' (the consumer is expected to filter these out)
